Row 1","reasoning_details":[{"type":"reasoning.text","text":"The user wants me to extract information from a personnel card table image and return it as a structured JSON object.

**1. Analyze the Image:**
The image shows a personnel card with columns:
- Dienstliche Stellung (Official Position)
- Dienstort (Place of Service)
- Gehaltsklasse (Salary Class)
- Jahresgehalt Monatsgehalt Taglohn (Annual/Monthly/Daily Salary)
